title: Massive 508/7 for Western Hope
bodyText:
OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Oudtshoorn-based club, Western Hope on Saturday at the Bridgton Sports Grounds, posted a massive 508/7 against neighbours – Union Stars – in a match in which Western Hope won by 352 runs.


> For Western Hope EAJ Carew posted 166 (13x6, 13x4).


The summarised scorecards of completed matches in the Reserve and Women's League that were completed the past weekend are:

Reserve Division 1Western Hope vs Union Stars BWestern Hope 508/7 (50 overs)Union Stars 'B' 156 all out (29 overs)Western Hope won by 352 runs.

Blanco vs George BBlanco 111 all out (overs)George 112/6 (22.4 overs)George B won by 4 wickets.

Albertinia vs HeadlinersHeadliners 115 all out (33.5 overs)Albertinia 120/5 (22.3 overs)Albertinia won by 5 wickets.

Melkhoutfontein vs MayflowerMayflower 168 all out (47 overs)Melkhoutfontein 152 all out (46.5 overs)Mayflower won by 16 runs.Reserve League Division 2

Knysna Cavaliers C vs Plett Pioneers BPlett Pioneers B 168 all out (33.1 overs)Knysna Cavaliers C 118 all out (34 overs)Plett Pioneers B won by 50 runs.

Hartenbos B vs Sussex BSussex B 225/9 (40 overs)Hartenbos B 194 all out (36.3 overs)Sussex B won by 31 runs.

Beaufort West A vs Calitzdorp Young Stars BBeaufort West A 109 all out (30.2 overs)Calitzdorp Young Stars B 83 all out (19.5 overs)Beaufort West won by 26 runs.

Ramblers B vs George CRamblers B 183 all out (38.3 overs)George C 184/9 (35 overs)George C won by 1 wicket.

George D vs Knysna Cavaliers BGeorge D 188/8 (40 overs)Knysna Cavaliers 'B' 176 all out (32.2 overs)George D won by 12 runs.

Plett Pioneers C vs Pirates United BPirates United B 173 all out (21.5 overs)Plett Pioneers C 174/6 (21.3 overs)Plett Pioneers C won by 4 wickets.

Women's Division 1Sussex vs GeorgeSussex 68 all out (19.2 overs)George 69/2 (11.2 overs)George won by 8 wickets

‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
